title: Crispy Korean Cheese Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly and umami-rich dish featuring fromage frais for a unique twist on traditional Korean stir-fries, caramelized for an extra savory flavor with a touch of sweetness. This recipe is also fodmap-friendly.
instructions: Prepare fromage frais by gently warming it until smooth. Mix in ginger, soy sauce, mirin, and rice vinegar.
Heat sesame oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add finely sliced green onions and stir-fry for about 1 minute.
Gradually add the prepared fromage frais mixture to the pan. Stir constantly until the cheese has melted and begins to caramelize, about 2-3 minutes.
Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds on top of the cheese as it cooks. Adjust seasoning with salt if needed.
Serve hot over steamed vegetables or noodles for a full meal.
